utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan: health_coverage is present with physical and mental components and costs; property_coverage is present but explicitly 'Not included', so it lacks required costs and coverage; travel_coverage is present with plan, benefits, and monthly cost; additional_services are present with items and costs (one item omitted with note, but the field exists with costs for others); total_budget is present with monthly and annual cost breakdown for two options. Fully specified per instructions means each item should include coverage and costs; property_coverage fails this. The other four items include coverage and costs sufficiently.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three specific plans: PrimeCare Premium Plan for physical health, PrimeCare Premium Plan (Mental Health Component) for mental health (this corresponds to PrimeCare Premium Plan under mental_health), and PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel. Additional services listed (telemedicine, scaled wellness program) are generic and do not directly map to named ground-truth items except Telemedicine Services, but in the plan it's just a generic add-on, not a named product from the ratings list; thus we map only the explicitly named plans. From the ground-truth: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health) has rating 6; PrimeCare Premium Plan (mental health) has rating 4; PrimeTravel Premium Plan has rating 6.
